getLpData(address).details: Reverts if `pairAddress_` isn't actually an LP pair - callers should gate this behind `isLpToken` first unless they want that revert.

getTokenData(address).details: Pulls the standard ERC20 metadata plus the caller's balance in one call.

isLpToken(address).details: Best-effort detection of a Uniswap-V2-style LP pair: a real pair exposes `token0()`; anything else (a plain ERC20, an EOA, etc.) reverts, which we treat as "not an LP token" rather than letting the call fail.
